claims.summary: Reconnect or unavailable telemetry-age states can make bidirectional status look falsely healthy.
claims.rationale: Existing reciprocity/texture-shape tests distinguish connected-no-recent-messages, stale sensory, stale telemetry, and false bidirectional fits.

claims.summary: High-entropy pressure trend smoothing needs proof that the dynamic window respects ballast rather than chasing spikes.
claims.rationale: The `pressure_trend_smoothing` suite verifies high-entropy ballast, latest semantic viscosity preservation, semantic coherence/fidelity, fast thinning, and clog warnings.

claims.summary: Burst activity should be visible without changing sensory cadence.
claims.rationale: Bridge reciprocity now carries per-lane sent/received totals; cadence behavior itself remains unchanged.
